title: Creating a Business Plan
scenario: A startup team needs to create a business plan for their new venture. The plan should include a detailed description of the business, its goals, and its financial projections. The team wants to present the plan to potential investors.
constraints: Must include a clear executive summary

evaluationCriteria.description: The executive summary is clear and concise.
The financial projections are accurate and realistic.
The business plan demonstrates a clear understanding of the market and the feasibility of the business.
